ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ethnicity */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "turnout_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turnout class */,
  "phone_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phone type */,
  "turnout_scale" REAL /* Scale of voter turnout likelihood */,
  "turnout_score" REAL /* Score representing voter turnout likelihood */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the respondent's data for analysis */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the respondent */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the respondent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_turnout_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("turnout_class_id") REFERENCES turnout_classes ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_phone_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_type_id") REFERENCES phone_types ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political view entry */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "party_affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party affiliation */,
  "approve_president" TEXT /* Approval of the current president */,
  "climate_change_belief" TEXT /* Belief regarding climate change */,
  "feminism_support" TEXT /* Support for feminism */,
  "genballot_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the generic ballot */,
  "hdem_favorability" TEXT /* Favorability towards the Democratic House */,
  "hrep_favorability" TEXT /* Favorability towards the Republican House */,
  "women_in_politics_attitude" TEXT /* Attitude towards women in politics */,
  "election_outcome_prediction" TEXT /* Prediction of the election outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_views_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_views_party_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_affiliation_id") REFERENCES party_affiliations ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer given by the respondent */,
  "answer_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the respondent's answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey question */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the survey question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the political party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Founding year of the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary of individuals with this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_types" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone type */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phone type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the phone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnout_classes" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout class */,
  "turnout_class" TEXT /* Name of the turnout class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the turnout class */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_survey_answers" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer given by the respondent */,
  "answer_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the respondent's answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_party_affiliations" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "party_affiliation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party affiliation */,
  "affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date of party affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id", "party_affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_regions" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of residence in the region */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of residence in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id", "region_id")
)
column_names: Weight assigned to the respondent's data for analysis
Unique identifier for each political view entry
Expected result of the generic ballot
Unique identifier for each survey response
Confidence level of the respondent's answer
Unique identifier for each survey question
Unique identifier for each political party

Unique identifier for each education level
Average salary of individuals with this education level
Unique identifier for each phone type
Unique identifier for each turnout class
